title: [Let's Do] API
description: A Library for Forge and Fabric with utilities such as Render Features, Recipe Books and Wood API
body:
![logo](https://imgur.com/xnTQAch.png"logo") ## An API mainly used by our Mods that offers some utilities for specific features. **Requires Architectury API!**

### **Wood API** An easy and leightweight Wood API that helps registering Boats and Signs ### **Recipe Book** A vanilla style recipe book - done by creating only two java classes. ### **Rendering API** A Render System for Blocks and Armor. Makes it easy to create 3D rendered Armor. ### **Conditional Recipes** Simple Conditinal Recipes for Forge and Fabric ### **Config** Some helper stuff for making config files with comments ***You can find a few examples*** [here](https://github.com/Cristelknight999/DoAPI#readme "Github")
